text.title: SEO for SPAs Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed in real deployments of SEO for SPAs. Each ties a symptom to a root cause and a concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Google indexes empty homepage; organic traffic flat for months.
antipattern.fix: Switch / and /blog/* to SSG/ISR; verify in Search Console URL inspection that content is present.

antipattern.symptom: Every page in SERPs shows same title 'My App'.
antipattern.root-cause: Metadata set once globally, never per route.
antipattern.fix: Use framework metadata API per route; emit per-page title + description + canonical.

antipattern.symptom: EN users see UK pages; duplicate-content warnings in Search Console.
antipattern.fix: Emit hreflang per locale + x-default; verify via hreflang testing tool.

antipattern.symptom: LCP at p75 mobile 4.2s; SEO drop after Core Update.
antipattern.root-cause: No CWV targets in spec; regression unnoticed.
antipattern.fix: Add CWV targets in spec; CI step using Lighthouse or PageSpeed Insights API to gate on regressions.
